info.title: flux-sdk
info.description: An ecosystem to make creating and editing ProtoFlux in and out of Resonite faster and more maintainable

commands.name: build
commands.description: Compile ProtoGraph into a Resonite record

options.name: --out
options.description: File to write output to. Defaults to '<source>.brson'

options.name: --out-dir
options.description:
When compiling multiple source files, write all
output .brson files to this directory.

options.name: --project-directory
options.description:
Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
modules will be resolved. The current directory by
default.

options.name: --pack-to
options.description:
The format to pack to: 'moduprint' (default). The
template specified must be the be the correct style
(check the template name).

options.name: --watch
options.description:
Will watch the ProtoGraph file for changes and
recompile when detected.

options.name: --glob
options.description:
Interpret the source files using glob patterns
relative to the project directory

options.name: --library-path
options.description:
Manually specify a directory to search for the
ProtoFlux DLLs at runtime for reflection. You an also
set the RESONITE_MANAGED_DATA_PATH environment
variable instead of specifying this command line
argument. Use this if your Resonite files are
installed in a non-standard location or you want to
use a different set of DLLs.

options.name: --template-path
options.description:
Path to Resonite record (.brson) to use as a template
for packing the ProtoFlux into

options.name: --parse-debug
options.description: File to write AST intermediate format to

options.name: --component-debug
options.description: File to write node IL to

options.name: --graphviz-debug
options.description:
File to write the graphviz dot file to. Only
applicable when the graphviz layout engine is used

options.name: --record-debug
options.description: addition to the .brson bundle)

options.name: --stop-after-parse
options.description:
Stop the compilation after the ProtoGraph files are
parsed into a syntactic AST. Errors from bad syntax
will be reported, but few to no semantic errors will
be reported.

options.name: --stop-after-resolve
options.description:
Stop the compilation after the ProtoGraph program has
been lowered into components (IR). All compiler
errors will still be reported, but the program will
not layout nodes nor produce a packed .brson record.

options.name: --compact-error-messages
options.description:
Format compiler error messages to the console so that
they are easier to parse for an IDE. They will be
formatted as a 'mostly' single line, but lines after
the first in error messages will not be included on
the first line.

options.name: --layout-engine
options.description:
Engine to use to layout ProtoFlux nodes. 'builtin'
using the GraphShape libary and 'graphviz' (default).

options.name: --skip-restore
options.description:
Do not restore package dependencies. Only build. Only
applies if a protograph.toml file is in the root of
the project.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
Compiler build profiles. fast, dev, release, and
allUnsafe are included by default. If not specified,
dev is used.

options.name: --optimization-preset
options.description: Apply a different optimization preset than normal

options.name: --optimization
options.description:
Comma separated list of compiler optimizations to
perform. Prefix an optimization with 'no' to disable
it. Overrides the profile optimizations.

options.name: --no-default-assets
options.description:
Do not include default assets in the packed record.
This includes the slot templates, heap and various
dynamic variables.
--skip-unmodified, -S Don't recompile source files if they and all of their
dependencies have not changed. This will NOT
recompile modules that have errors unless they have
been modified.

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --project-directory
options.description:
Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
modules will be resolved. The current directory by
default.

options.name: --project-packages
options.description:
Delete the package links in the .pg-packages
directory in this project

options.name: --global-packages
options.description:
Delete ALL the packages in the global package
directory. Warning: this may break other projects on
this machines that will need to be restored.

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: froox-docs
commands.description:
Reflects Froox engine metadata and writs information
about protoflux nodes and other types to a file

options.name: --json
options.description:
Output as a JSON dictionary mapping functions to
documentation strings

options.name: --out
options.description: File to write metadata to

options.name: --library-path
options.description:
Manually specify a directory to search for the
ProtoFlux DLLs at runtime for reflection. You an also
set the RESONITE_MANAGED_DATA_PATH environment
variable instead of specifying this command line
argument. Use this if your Resonite files are
installed in a non-standard location or you want to
use a different set of DLLs.

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: init
commands.description:
Create a new ProtoGraph project template in the
current directory

options.name: --library
options.description:
Create a project setup to be packaged as a reusable
library

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: lsp
commands.description:
Start the ProtoGraph language server using the
Language Server Protocol

options.name: --library-path
options.description:
Manually specify a directory to search for the
ProtoFlux DLLs at runtime for reflection. You an also
set the RESONITE_MANAGED_DATA_PATH environment
variable instead of specifying this command line
argument. Use this if your Resonite files are
installed in a non-standard location or you want to
use a different set of DLLs.

options.name: --log-directory
options.description:
Output logs generated by the server to a logging
directory. Log files will be created there and new
files will be created on an hourly rolling interval.

options.name: --log-level
options.description:
The level to log at [Verbose; Debug; Information;
Warning; Error; Fatal]. This applies for logging to
the client as well as file logging if enabled with
the log directory argument.

options.name: --code-share
options.description:
Enable code sharing from the LSP on the address
ws://127.0.0.1:<port>/notify

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new ProtoGraph project in a new sub-directory

options.name: --library
options.description:
Create a project setup to be packaged as a reusable
library

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: pack
commands.description:
Pack the contents of this project into a
distributable ProtoGraph package

options.name: --project-directory
options.description:
Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
modules will be resolved. The current directory by
default.

options.name: --out
options.description:
File to write output to. Defaults to the
pgx/<package_name>-<package_version>.zip.

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: parse-record
commands.description:
Reads and convert a Resonite record (.brson) into
human readable JSON

options.name: --out
options.description:
File to write the JSON data to. Defaults to
'<record_path>.json'

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: restore
commands.description:
Install all ProtoGraph dependencies of this project
required to compile

options.name: --project-directory
options.description:
Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
modules will be resolved. The current directory by
default.

options.name: --lock
options.description:
Generate a protograph.lock file with pinned
dependencies

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: style
commands.description:
Style source files into Resonite markup with syntax
highlighting

options.name: --out-dir
options.description:
Directory to which to store the output files.
Defaults to the current directory.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defaults to styling ProtoGraph.

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show the current Flux SDK version

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.
